_provenance.note: indexSymbols returns symbols only (no per-name details despite includeDetails). For details use operation='metaSymbols' or stockProfile per name.

_golden_master.backs: Universe + id-bridge anchor (M0) and universe_class segmentation (design §4.3). A small, liquid, representative cross-section that includes the segmentation edge cases.
_golden_master.universe_class_hints: EKGYO -> gyo_reit; KCHOL, SAHOL -> holding (ENKAI, SISE are conglomerates to review); DSTKF, TRALT -> likely fund/etf (verify — F-suffixed codes are often funds); banks (AKBNK, GARAN, ISCTR, VAKBN, YKBNK) report on a bank template (no COGS — see accounting_regime sample). DO NOT hardcode classes — derive at ingestion and store on Security.universe_class; this list is only for cross-checking that derivation.
_golden_master.id_bridge_anchors: EREGL, ASELS, KCHOL, GARAN all resolve here and have golden samples in this folder; use them to test ticker<->ISIN<->mkkMemberOid<->LEI round-trips against the v1 graph.
